states.name: submitted
states.description: Checkpoint intent is durable and awaits validation/acceptance.
entry_requirements: Requestor, subjects, scope, consistency, privacy and portability intent are recorded.

states.name: validating
states.description: Provider capability, subject state, policy and budget are being evaluated.

states.name: accepted
states.description: Request is accepted into checkpoint capture work.
entry_requirements: Checkpoint Activity reference and decision Receipt exist.

states.name: rejected
states.description: Request will not produce checkpoint capture under current scope/policy.
entry_requirements: Typed rejection outcome, evidence and limitations exist.

states.name: cancelled
states.description: Request was cancelled before accepted capture completed.
entry_requirements: Cancellation authority and cleanup/partial outputs are recorded.

required_preconditions: Request is schema-valid and authority is identified.
Current subject generations and Provider capability/policy can be evaluated.
Capture Activity is durable and request scope/limitations are fixed.
Typed incompatibility, unsupported capability, policy or validation reason is retained.
Cancellation and any partial/temporary state are reconciled.
